name.full: KISS Governance Agent for M365 Copilot

description.short: Govern AI-assisted projects: scope decisions, readiness, verification debt.
description.full: Manager-facing governance agent surfacing the KISS reasoning engine's outputs in Microsoft 365 Copilot: certification readiness by team, ACCEPT/WARN/BLOCK scope decisions with reasoning traces, parked-feature decision log, and verification-debt alerts. Synthetic demo data only.
